name: rain-ai
description: A shareable Claude marketplace for getting set up: onboarding, system orientation, and device bootstrapping. The front door to a Claude-as-an-OS workflow.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Portable, general-purpose productivity skills: breakout (open a fresh chat in a new tab), new-warp-chat (the shared seeded-Warp-tab launcher breakout builds on), handoff (compact the conversation for a new agent), and grill-me (stress-test a plan by interview).

plugins.name: brrain
plugins.description: Second-brain knowledge loop over a local-first brrain knowledge base: device setup, provenance-tagged capture, trust-gated synthesis into canonical wiki pages, read-back, and consistency audit.

plugins.name: cli-environment
plugins.description: Configures the terminal and CLI environment for talking to Claude Code and Codex on a device: the Warp terminal, a portable global Claude Code settings baseline, and the Codex CLI hooks feature. Environment/tooling setup, NOT a general onboarding or 'get me set up' entry point — each capability ships its own setup skill.
